responses.question_text: How important are each of these factors when choosing a body wash?
responses.raw_answer: {"Cleansing effectiveness": 4, "Moisturization / skin hydration": 5, "Fragrance / scent quality": 5, "Gentleness on skin": 5, "Value for money": 4, "Innovation / uniqueness": 4, "Brand trust and reputation": 3, "Convenience / ease of use": 3}
